Step.label: Active = Yes?
Step.notes: not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "0") or not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "False")

Parameter.name: Condition
Parameter.value: not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "0") or not StrEqlNoCase(GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Active", 0)), "False")

Step.label: sSMSRouting
Step.notes:
Test(StrLeft(sSMSRouting, 2) = "$(", GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Routing", 0), sSMSrouting)
Test(StrLen(sSubject) > 0, sSMSRouting, GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "Routing", 0)))

Step.label: Unknown Host
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Unknown Host; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Unknown Host; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Step.label: REST HTTP Request
Step.notes:
https://guardmodule-api.n-allo.dvp
c_sURLGuardAPI & c_sGetAllCurrentActive & GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigId", 0))
c_sURLGuardAPI & "/api/Guards/GetAllCurrentActiveGuardsByGuardConfig/" & GetAt(p_lsAttrValues, Find(p_lsAttrNames, "ConfigId", 0))

Parameter.label: Ignore Invalid SSL Certificate Date (expired certificate)

Step.label: Timeout
Step.notes:
c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Timeout"
c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Timeout; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Timeout; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Step.label: Connection Failure
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Connection Failure; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Connection Failure; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Step.label: Connection Failure
Step.notes: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Failure; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceTag & "REST HTTP Request - Failure; URL=" & c_sURLAPI

Step.label: Cannot Find Parameter
Step.notes: "Get Structured Parameter - Cannot Find Parameter; SendSMS API URL"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Get Structured Parameter - Cannot Find Parameter; SendSMS API URL"

Step.label: Error
Step.notes: "Get Structured Parameter - Error; SendSMS API URL"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: "Get Structured Parameter - Error; SendSMS API URL"
